title: Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat
tagline: Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: The Gomateshwar Mahadeva Temple Kerakat (Devanagari: गोमतेश्वर महादेव मंदिर केराकत, Gomateshwar Mahādeva Mandir), meaning "the Great God of the Gomati River", is the largest and mo
overview.description: The Gomateshwar Mahadeva Temple Kerakat (Devanagari: गोमतेश्वर महादेव मंदिर केराकत, Gomateshwar Mahādeva Mandir), meaning "the Great God of the Gomati River", is the largest and most ornate Hindu temple in the medieval temple group found at Kerakat in Uttar Pradesh, India. It is considered one of the best examples of temples preserved from the medieval period in India.

topPlaces.name: Saraibiru
topPlaces.description: Saraibeeru is a village in India, located near the Kerakat in the Jaunpur district in the state of Uttar Pradesh. The village is 30 km (19 mi) from Jaunpur.

topPlaces.name: Kerakat
topPlaces.description: Kerakat or Kirakat is a town and nagar panchayat in Jaunpur district of the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh with a population of approximately 13,500. It is situated near the Gomati River, which helps the land around the town stay very fertile.

topPlaces.name: Hurhuri
topPlaces.description: Huruhuri is a village about 2 km north from the Gomti River in the tehsil of Kerakat, Jaunpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. It belongs to the Varanasi Division.

topPlaces.name: Bhadehari
topPlaces.description: Bhadehari is a village in Kerakat nagar panchayat, Jaunpur, Uttar Pradesh, India. The village contains 360.35 hectares.

topPlaces.name: Badhauna
topPlaces.description: Badhauna is a village in Pindra Tehsil of Varanasi district in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. The village falls under gram panchayat by the same name as the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Lal Bahadur Shastri Airport, Varanasi (21 km) and the nearest railway station is Varanasi Junction (35 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat?
faq.a: Stays in Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gomateshwar Mahadev Temple,Kerakat?
faq.a: The top attractions are Saraibiru, Kerakat, Hurhuri, Bhadehari, Badhauna.
